'''Recopi''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Recopi system/Legends|Recopi system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by five [[Planet/Legends|planets]].<ref name="CCW" />

{{Star-stub}}
